creator: flynn@energyhq.homeip.net
text:
Okay,

It seems ACE is fast these days :) Here is a patch against the original 0.3 
port that will upgrade it to 0.5.3 (fixes some bug, faster and now can be 
configured)

Now if a kind commiter would commit this one :) 

Cheers!

-- 
        Miguel Mendez - flynn@energyhq.homeip.net
        EnergyHQ :: http://energyhq.homeip.net
        FreeBSD - The power to serve!
